title: Cursor 推出全新 AI 代理体验，挑战 Claude Code 和 Codex
content: 随着 Cursor 推出下一代产品，这家人工智能编码初创公司必须比以往更直接地与 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 竞争。
original_title: Cursor Launches a New AI Agent Experience to Take On Claude Code and Codex
original_content: As Cursor launches the next generation of its product, the AI coding startup has to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic more directly than ever.

title: Anthropic 表示 Claude Code 订阅者需要为 OpenClaw 的使用支付额外费用
content: 对于 Claude Code 订阅者来说，使用 Anthropic 的编码助手以及 OpenClaw 和其他第三方工具的费用将会变得更加昂贵。
original_title: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
original_content: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

title: OpenAI 收购了科技脱口秀节目“TBPN”，并为自己赢得了一些积极的消息
content: OpenAI 正在收购 TBPN，这是一档在硅谷精英中很受欢迎的商业脱口秀节目，以继续与其负面公众形象作斗争。
original_title: OpenAI Acquires Tech Talk Show ‘TBPN’—and Buys Itself Some Positive News
original_content: OpenAI is acquiring TBPN, a business talk show that’s popular among Silicon Valley elites, as it continues to battle its negative public image.

title: OpenClaw 给用户带来了另一个对安全性感到恐惧的理由
content: 这种病毒式 AI 代理工具让攻击者能够悄悄地获得未经身份验证的管理员访问权限。
original_title: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
original_content: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.

title: DevDay 发布的 AMA
content: 这是历史上成为建设者的最好时代。在 DevDay 2025 上，我们推出了下一代工具和模型，以帮助开发人员更快地编码、更可靠地构建代理并扩展他们的应用程序

title: Anthropic 以 4 亿美元收购生物技术初创公司 Coefficient Bio：报告
content: 据 The Information 和 Eric Newcomer 报道，Anthropic 以 4 亿美元的股票交易收购了隐形生物技术人工智能初创公司 Coefficient Bio。
original_title: Anthropic buys biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: Reports
original_content: Anthropic has purchased the stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to The Information and Eric Newcomer.

title: OpenAI 收购 TBPN，这是一档由创始人主导的热门商业脱口秀节目
content: 硅谷最受欢迎的科技播客 TBPN 将独立运营，尽管它由首席政治执行官 Chris Lehane 监管。
original_title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
original_content: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

title: 编辑部
